final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover design for the automotive brand Chang'an, announcing the launch of the Q06 model.

Style/medium: clean corporate presentation cover, modern automotive marketing aesthetic, subtle gradient overlay for text legibility
Subject: bold headline "长安起源Q06将于9月上市" with supporting subtitle, centered alignment with breathing room
Composition: wide landscape format with title block positioned in lower third, generous negative space above for background imagery
Scene/backdrop: ethereal abstract automotive background suggesting speed and innovation, soft bokeh light trails, translucent layered elements creating depth
Lighting/mood: soft diffused glow with subtle rim lighting, professional and aspirational atmosphere
Color palette: deep navy or charcoal base with electric blue or silver accents, high contrast for readability
Text (verbatim): "长安起源Q06将于9月上市"
Constraints: must remain legible when projected; title must dominate; background should not compete with text hierarchy
Avoid: cluttered backgrounds, hard shadows on text, overly literal car photography, generic stock photo aesthetic, decorative flourishes
